creator: tj+freebsd_bugs@a13.fr
text:
Created attachment 168384
x11-toolkits/rubygem-uh shar file

uh is a small ruby gem providing a basic Xlib toolkit, which is a
dependency for uh-wm, another ruby gem (an X11 Window Manager) I'd
like to submit after this one.

I'm the author of both, and this is my first port request so I'm not
sure everything is right. In particular, I'm not sure if I should use
my own mail address as maintainer, or ruby@FreeBSD.org.
